description:
What: Cheney's root walk includes live RC-arena objects' FzValue fields. Address-range check decides forward-vs-skip per field.

Why: Cross-region tracing in the other direction — an RC object holding a Cheney pointer is a Cheney root.

CLIF impact: runtime-only.

Removes: nothing.

Tests: stress test where RC objects hold Cheney pointers; assert no Cheney dangling refs.
title: fz-dps.B4: live RC region as Cheney root set
